event_name: Star Wars Unlimited - Ashes of the Empire - Pre Release Event Spots are limited and prerelease kits will go fast. Secure your seat today and prepare to claim the ashes of the Galactic Empire! Only 16 Spots! The Empire is Falling. What Will You Build From the Ashes? Get ready to fight for the future of the galaxy! Join us for our Star Wars: Unlimited – Ashes of the Empire Prerelease Event. This eighth set dives straight into the Battle of Endor and its chaotic aftermath. Whether you're siding with the New Republic, rallying Mandalorian warriors, or taking command of the desperate Imperial Remnant, this is your first chance to play with the new cards before the official release. What You Get Every player will receive an official Prerelease Box containing: 6 Booster Packs to crack open and build your minimum 30-card Sealed deck. Exclusive Promo Leaders: Every kit includes exclusive prerelease variant versions of both Luke Skywalker and Emperor Palpatine Every player in the room will have access to these two leaders right out of the box, regardless of what they pull! Damage counters, guides, and tokens to jump right into the action. New Mechanics to Master introduces highly aggressive tempo shifts that will change how you approach the Sealed format: Advantage Tokens: These are temporary upgrades that grant a unit +1/+0. You can stack them up on a single unit, but they burn off as soon as that unit finishes attacking or defending. Bank your tokens and cash them in for one massive swing! Support: When you play a unit with the keyword, you immediately get to attack with another friendly unit. It's a free extra action that will help you control the pace of the game.
